# desktop

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Desktop surface arrangement — the open tabs laid out as free-floating, draggable, resizable windows (drag, resize, z-order on focus, maximize, minimize).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `SurfaceArrangement.Variant` "Desktop" → `AppWindowsBody`
  - Uses: `apps.Apps`, `apps.Tab`, `apps.TabSurface`, `apps.useTabs`, `apps/surface-arrangement.SurfaceArrangement`, `primitives/icon-button.IconButton`, `primitives/tab-id.getTabId`, `primitives/text.Text`, `primitives/ui-kit.CHROME_THEME_SCOPE`, `primitives/ui-kit.PortalThemeScopeProvider`, `ui/theme-engine.ScopedAppTheme`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
